description_long: This is a two-story detached house situated on a sloped plot, featuring a prominent hip roof with reddish-brown tiles. The house exterior is finished in a combination of brick and light-colored trim, with symmetrical balconies on both floors facing the front. The property is enclosed by a low, white fence and includes a paved driveway that leads up to the main entrance and garage area. The landscaping consists of a grassy yard that follows the slope of the terrain, with retaining walls supporting the elevated driveway and rear section. Large windows are arranged in regular rows, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces.
description: A two-story brick house with a hip roof, symmetrical balconies, and a sloped grassy yard enclosed by a white fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two stacked balconies, and the fenced grassy yard.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the sloped terrain, retaining wall, and the driveway leading to the garage area.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the driveway, garage entrance, and the upper yard area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the slope, retaining wall, and the house's side elevation with balconies.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with steps, covered porch, and decorative columns supporting the balcony above.
